products.name: Zebra DS5500 Industrial Barcode Scanner
products.notes: Commonly deployed in warehouse pick-and-pack stations.

products.notes: Standard thermal label printer for logistics labels up to 4 inches.

products.name: Zebra ZT421 Industrial Label Printer
products.notes: Wider carriage version — not compatible with ZT411 label templates.

products.name: Impinj R700 RFID Fixed Reader
products.notes: Enterprise-grade fixed RFID reader. High-value item, requires on-site inspection for returns.

products.name: Hytrol M2000 Conveyor Belt Module
products.notes: High-value item. On-site inspection required. Technical team sign-off mandatory for returns.

products.name: Linde ELT3 Electric Order Picker
products.notes: Safety-critical equipment. Any safety defect is auto-escalated to P1. On-site inspection required.

products.name: Robopac AutoWrap-5 Stretch Wrap Machine
products.notes: Semi-automatic pallet wrapper. Bearings and rollers covered under standard warranty.
